text_block_list.name: Still in Love
text_block_list.text: Arve, could you spare us some of your time?

text_block_list.name: Still in Love
text_block_list.text:
We thought we'd hold a birthday party 
together, and just finished preparations. 
It would be lovely if you could come.

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text: A birthday party? …Ah, there are many upcoming birthdays.

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text:
I don't mind dropping by… for a moment. 
You can go ahead and celebrate the others' 
then.

text_block_list.name: Still in Love
text_block_list.text:
Ummm, there… aren't any others. 
It's a birthday party for you, Arve.

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text:
…Ah… You mean to say it's not 
a joint birthday party?

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text: (……Of course. That's… the norm, isn't it.)

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text: A birthday party… just for me…

text_block_list.name: Still in Love
text_block_list.text:
We've prepared tea and sweets 
for you as well. Ah, I believe I also 
saw a "Birthday Girl" sash…

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text:
That… I do not need. Well, I can 
show up at least. Lead the way.

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text:
(…Standing out as the only "birthday girl"? 
What a strange feeling…)
